case_title: ACME BREAD COMPANY VS MOE, SHANNON

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOE, SHANNON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACME BREAD COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOE, SHANNON $1,742.87 PRINCIPAL, $102.71 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,845.58, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-02-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-30-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,747.87 FILED BY ACME BREAD COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MOE, SHANNON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
